messages.content: Because the case is different in my country. I would be easier to understand the ethnicity group as it is , can you paraphrase it and make it more formal ?

Due to the unique circumstances in my country, it would be more comprehensible to refer to ethnic groups by their specific names. Thus, may I kindly request that you rephrase the statement in a more formal manner?

Thank you for sharing that. But, because the evidence was based only to specific ethnic groups I cannot include in the option something outside of what has been already been in the evidence. Paraphrase please

Thank you for your input. However, since the evidence available pertains solely to particular ethnic groups, I cannot include options beyond the scope of said evidence. Could you kindly rephrase your statement in a different manner?
No personally identifiable information is required unless you voluntarily offer personal or contact information in any of the comment fields”  Paraphrase please

There is no necessity for you to provide any personally identifiable details unless you willingly choose to disclose personal or contact information in any of the comment sections. Can I assist you with any other sentence?
However, to maintain anonymous data collection,  please make sure not to include any identifying information in the free text boxes
In order to ensure that data is collected in an anonymous manner, please refrain from including any identifiable information in the free text boxes. Do you need further assistance with anything else?
However, to maintain anonymous data collection,  please make sure not to include any identifying information in the free text boxes is there any typos in this sentence ?
No, there are no typos in the given sentence. It is grammatically correct and error-free.
Sorry, that was by mistake. There is no intention to provide any payment. I have updated that in the information sheet. Is there any typos in this sentences?
No, there are no typos in the given sentence. It is grammatically correct and error-free.
How to mention on the participant information sheet to cascade/snowball the survey kindly?

You could mention on the participant information sheet something along the lines of: "We would greatly appreciate it if you could help us spread the word about this survey by sharing it with your peers or colleagues who might be interested in participating. The more people who respond to the survey, the more valuable the data will be. Thank you in advance for your support in helping us gather as much information as possible."
We need you to complete this survey and kindly ask you to answer questions as thoughtfully and honestly as possible without further research, How to say that kindly?

We kindly ask that you complete this survey to the best of your ability and answer the questions honestly and thoughtfully without conducting any further research beforehand. Your feedback is invaluable to us and we appreciate your time and effort in providing us with comprehensive and meaningful responses.
Can you give justification for the maximum sample size when conduct a cross-sectional study using survey as a data collector tool.

The maximum sample size for a cross-sectional study using a survey as a data collection tool depends on several factors such as the level of confidence required, expected response rate, desired margin of error, population size, diversity of the population, and type of variable being analyzed. 

A larger sample size generally reduces random error and increases the precision of estimates from the survey. A large sample size can provide reliable estimates of parameters and increase the generalizability of the results. It can also increase the statistical power of the study and enable the detection of smaller effect sizes.

However, a larger sample size can also lead to increased costs and a high burden on participants. The cost of data collection, analysis, and processing increases proportionally with the sample size. It can also result in lower response rates and reduced data quality due to a lack of participant engagement.

Therefore, the maximum sample size should strike a balance between obtaining the required level of precision, generalizability, and statistical power while minimizing the study's cost and burden on the participants.
